name: localspace-semantics-v2
description: Measures semantic coherence of localspace name sets generated by the LS-FILL pipeline. Fixed timing bug from v1: each run now starts the player at a site entrance (depth 2) so the LS-FILL batch gate fires on Turn 1. Then GETs /diagnostics/sites to read active_site with all spaces already filled. Deterministic metrics: ls_fill_rate (all spaces named?), ls_unique_name_rate (no exact duplicates?), localspace_count, ls_size_spread, ls_mean_size. row_extract captures the full local_spaces array for post-run Mother Brain semantic review.
